description: Configure target die access path for internal scan.
Configure scan/FPP data path before scan shift.
Shift scan stimulus data into the target die.
Capture scan response; this phase contributes high transient current risk.
Shift scan response data out of the target die.
Optional scan status or result readback.
Configure access path for BIST trigger.
Trigger local BIST start through the PTAP/STAP access path.
Local BIST execution. This phase does not occupy PTAP, so future schedulers may overlap it with other die access phases.
Re-configure access path for BIST result readback.
Read BIST result bits through the PTAP/STAP access path.
Configure access path to adjacent source/destination DWR wrappers.
Configure DWR EXTEST mode on adjacent wrappers.
Shift DWR EXTEST stimulus bits into wrapper registers.
Capture die-to-die interconnect response through DWR EXTEST.
Shift out DWR EXTEST response bits.
Configure target die access path for instrument access.
Access instrument network. Later models may replace this with SIB hierarchical or daisy-chain network timing.
